# Explorer Rebuild Roadmap

| ID | Task | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| EX-001 | Map current Explorer data needs vs. Torii/Norito capabilities in `../i23`; document required endpoints (REST, Norito, SSE/WS). | COMPLETED | `docs/roadmap/explorer_gap_analysis.md` documents gaps; maintain as APIs evolve. |
| EX-002 | Implement Explorer-focused endpoints in Torii (accounts/domains/assets/NFTs with metadata + counters, blocks/transactions/instructions history, metrics/peers summaries). | COMPLETED | `/v2/explorer/accounts`, `/domains`, `/asset-definitions`, `/assets`, `/nfts`, `/blocks`, `/transactions` + `/transactions/{hash}`, `/instructions`, and `/instructions/{hash}/{index}` now land in Torii with tests, and the frontend normalizes the instruction payloads to the Norito `{ kind, payload }` shape. Governance metrics now fetch Torii directly and listen to `GET /v2/gov/stream` (SSE), which emits `CouncilUpdated`/`UnlockStatsUpdated` and per-id `ReferendumUpdated`/`LocksUpdated`/`TallyUpdated`/`ProposalUpdated` so the dashboard refetches without manual refresh (polling remains as fallback). |
| EX-003 | Replace the frontend data layer to call Torii directly (Norito + WS/SSE clients, env-configurable base URL, remove legacy backend proxy). | COMPLETED | Accounts/domains/assets/NFTs/blocks/transactions now hit the `/v2/explorer/*` handlers directly, asset-definition fetchers live on Torii, governance/ZK/SoraFS calls bypass the backend proxy, query serialization no longer drops zero/false values, the production `Caddyfile` only serves the SPA, all telemetry consumers share a single `useTelemetryMetrics` helper, and the telemetry/peers UI now fetches Torii’s `/v2/explorer/metrics` + `/v2/telemetry/peers-info` without the legacy `/api` proxy. |
| EX-006 | Wire Torii explorer detail endpoints (assets, NFTs, account extras) + aggregation helpers so the UI can drop the legacy backend entirely. | COMPLETED | `/v2/explorer/accounts/{id}`, `/domains/{id}`, `/asset-definitions/{id}`, `/assets/{id}`, `/nfts/{id}`, `/blocks/{id}`, `/transactions/{hash}`, and `/instructions/{hash}/{index}` now resolve straight from Torii, and the frontend consumes the Norito instruction payloads plus `/v2/explorer/transactions/stream` + `/v2/explorer/instructions/stream` SSE feeds, so the legacy backend proxy/listeners are gone. |
| EX-004 | Surface new Iroha features in the UI (governance dashboards, KAIGI relays, SoraFS state, ZK proof telemetry) with meaningful visualizations. | COMPLETED | KAIGI relays overview/detail page, `/sorafs/registry`, `/governance`, and `/zk/telemetry` are live; the ZK page now includes filtered proof SSE throughput charts plus attachment/report analytics. |
| EX-005 | Strengthen automated testing (unit + integration + e2e smoke); ensure every new function has tests and complex logic has multiple cases. | COMPLETED | Explorer frontend now has Vitest coverage for instruction table behaviors (auto-open, retries, share/copy), API query-serialization helpers, the telemetry composables (`useTelemetryMetrics`/`usePeersTelemetry`), the reusable table pagination hook (`src/shared/lib/table.ts`), both home widgets (`latest-transactions` SSE refresh + `latest-blocks` rendering/navigation), the API URL helpers (`buildToriiUrl`, `buildToriiWsUrl`, `resolveApiUrl`), and four e2e smoke passes: routing/layout, Blocks data (`tests/e2e/blocks-data.smoke.test.ts`), Accounts data (`tests/e2e/accounts-data.smoke.test.ts`), plus an SSE-focused LatestTransactions stream test (`tests/e2e/latest-transactions-stream.smoke.test.ts`) that asserts Torii pushes trigger refetches only when filters match. |
| EX-007 | Point the frontend data layer directly at Torii (`VITE_API_URL` → `/v2/explorer/*`) and move SSE/WS consumers off the legacy `/api/v2` proxy. | COMPLETED | The API client + Vite proxy now default to `/v2/explorer` (configurable via `VITE_API_URL`); telemetry + KAIGI SSE streams use `buildToriiUrl('/v2/...')`, latest transactions/instructions widgets listen directly to Torii SSE/WebSocket feeds, and the instruction schemas normalize legacy wire payloads into the Norito `{ kind, payload }` JSON so every fetcher consumes the structured Torii responses without backend fallbacks. |
| EX-008 | Enforce “Norito-only serialization” across Torii explorer handlers and shared DTOs (remove serde/non-Norito API codecs). | COMPLETED | `crates/iroha_torii/src/explorer.rs` pagination query now derives the Norito + Json codecs (defaults handled via `#[norito(default = ...)]`), so serde usage is removed from the explorer app API path. |
| EX-009 | Document the large-task decomposition policy in `AGENTS.md`. | COMPLETED | Added rule 5 instructing agents to auto-break large requests into smaller subtasks and handle them with proper engineering practices instead of rejecting work. |
| EX-010 | Critique codebase quality (architecture, testing, UX correctness) per latest request. | COMPLETED | Addressed the flagged gaps: wired SearchField routing + tests, fixed TransactionsTable hash bindings, hardened BaseButton/BaseLink, and exposed KAIGI relays via the nav. |
| EX-011 | Surface Torii's new Sumeragi telemetry endpoints (`/v2/sumeragi/status`, `/v2/sumeragi/status/sse`, `/v2/sumeragi/telemetry`) inside the Explorer telemetry views. | COMPLETED | Telemetry page now consumes the enriched Torii status payloads (view-change index/proofs, inline post counters, RBC store pressure/evictions, consensus/VRF penalty totals, settlement + Nexus fee/staking snapshots, NPoS election details, lane governance seals) alongside the existing VRF summary, QC latency, backlog, and availability collectors. Node telemetry table now shows connected peer counts, queue usage (size/capacity), block delta vs best, and renders city + country when available. Governance updates now use `GET /v2/gov/stream` (SSE) for event-driven refetches with polling fallback. Sumeragi status now falls back to 10s polling when the SSE stream is closed/unavailable (and reports `Stream: polling`). Upstream Torii fix: allow `/v2/sumeragi/status/sse` under `telemetry_profile=extended` (gate by `expensive_metrics` instead of `developer_outputs`) so Explorer can show `Stream: connected` in prod; added a regression test in `../iroha` (`crates/iroha_torii/tests/sumeragi_status_sse_profile_gate.rs`). |
| EX-012 | Modernize the UI (Sora font + vector logo), add node presets, and ship multilingual/RTL support. | COMPLETED | Header node selector lets users pick Nexus/Testus or custom Torii bases (updates explorer/Torii URLs and persists). Sora variable font from `../sora-font` is loaded globally, the header logo uses the vector `hyperledger_iroha_final.svg`, and home/KAIGI surfaces now have HDR gradients + aligned tables. Arabic/Hebrew/Urdu locales are wired with RTL direction toggling in `useApplicationLanguage`; Urdu now uses a dedicated Nastaliq/Naskh-first font stack (fallbacks to Sora/sans-serif) so localized UI text renders with better script aesthetics. Fixed RTL header dropdown anchoring so teleported dialogs (language/menu/node selector) stay aligned to the trigger side instead of flipping to the opposite edge. Language selector behavior is now idempotent on repeat clicks (second click closes reliably), dropdown click-outside handling ignores trigger clicks to prevent reopen races, and header/portal layering is elevated so governance/content text no longer paints over the dialog. Home-page RTL button/dropdown positioning now relies on logical inline-end anchors only (no extra RTL side override), preventing the language selector from clipping off-screen. The latest translation QA pass corrected locale issues across Turkish, Sinhala, Tamil, Azerbaijani, Armenian, Georgian, Khmer, Burmese, Nepali, Dhivehi, Hebrew, Arabic, and Ukrainian strings; complete JSON locale packs are now generated + wired for all configured modern non-English locales (including Amharic, Azerbaijani, Armenian, Georgian, Turkish, Sinhala, Tamil, Indonesian, Ukrainian, Urdu, Hebrew, Arabic, Dhivehi, and Dzongkha) with placeholder/schema integrity validation. Added an Old Akkadian (`akk`) locale variant with poetic cuneiform semantic approximations, language-picker support, and a cuneiform-first font fallback. Added an Ancient Egyptian (`egy`) locale variant with poetic hieroglyphic semantic approximations, language-picker support, and a hieroglyph-first font fallback, and then removed English gloss text so `egy` now renders hieroglyph-only labels. `/accounts/:id` now has non-English localized account/detail/table labels across every configured locale (including programmatic locales), enforced by a localization regression test.  Verified 2026-03-09 with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/composables/useApplicationLanguage.test.ts src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/pages/HomePage.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-013 | Bootstrap a local explorer automatically from the localnet script and align the frontend to latest Torii explorer payloads (no legacy fallback). | COMPLETED | `scripts/sora_localnet.py` now syncs `iroha2-block-explorer-web/.env.local` (`VITE_API_URL`) and starts/stops a managed `pnpm dev` explorer process with PID/log tracking. Frontend API/schema parity updated for current Torii payloads (`/accounts` filtering path, NFT `metadata`, nullable `avg_block_time`, `Limited(...)` mintable labels) with test coverage in `src/shared/api/*.test.ts`. |
| EX-014 | Ignore generated local Explorer artifacts in git tracking. | COMPLETED | `.gitignore` now covers `output`, `test-results`, `playwright-report`, `coverage`, `.vite`, `.pnpm-store`, and local `.env*` overrides (keeping `*.example` files trackable) so local dev/test outputs stay out of git status. |
| EX-015 | Add HDR highlights for HDR-compatible displays across hero/background surfaces. | COMPLETED | Added CSS HDR overrides gated by `@media (dynamic-range: high), (video-dynamic-range: high)` + `@supports (color: color(display-p3 1 1 1))` in `src/app/App.vue`, `src/pages/HomePage.vue`, `src/shared/ui/components/BaseContentBlock.vue`, and `src/pages/KaigiRelays.vue`; SDR styling remains unchanged while HDR/P3 screens get brighter highlight gradients, stronger glow shadows, and richer status pill/detail panel accents. |
| EX-016 | Polish light mode visuals (palette contrast + surface legibility). | COMPLETED | Light theme token map now uses lighter surfaces (`surface: neutral-0`, `surface-variant: secondary-10`), stronger borders (`border-primary/secondary` moved to `secondary-20/30`), and dark-on-light `content-on-surface-variant` text. Added light-mode-specific chrome polish in `src/app/App.vue` (background gradients), `src/shared/ui/components/BaseContentBlock.vue` (card border/shadow/highlight tuning), and `src/widgets/home-page-info/HomePageInfo.vue` (stats strip gradient + typography contrast) while keeping dark mode and HDR-specific branches intact. |
| EX-017 | Add a small top spacing buffer on `/blocks` so content cards never tuck under the toolbar during movement/hover transitions. | COMPLETED | Added a page-level top margin on `src/pages/BlocksList.vue` (`margin-top: size(1)` + larger `md` buffer) to keep the blocks table card visually separated from the header toolbar. |
| EX-018 | Remove the outer container box around the home-page search section. | COMPLETED | Dropped `home-page__search` background/border/shadow/padding (including HDR overrides) in `src/pages/HomePage.vue` so only the search input itself is boxed. |
| EX-019 | Make home-page “Try a…” sample tags interactive. | COMPLETED | Converted sample chips to real buttons in `src/pages/HomePage.vue`, wired each to a route target (`blocks/tx/account/asset/nft` examples), and added regression coverage in `src/pages/HomePage.test.ts`. |
| EX-020 | Restore localization module loading when generated locale JSON files are missing. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/shared/lib/localization/index.ts` to stop importing missing locale JSON files (`si/ta/id/uk/ur/he/ar`) and use the already-defined in-code locale objects, clearing Vite import-analysis 500 errors on startup. |
| EX-021 | Handle Torii transaction `rejection_reason.json` payloads that can be either structured objects or plain strings. | COMPLETED | `DetailedTransaction` now accepts `rejection_reason.json` as either a record or string, and `src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts` covers both shapes to prevent regressions in `fetchTransaction` parsing. |
| EX-022 | Restore functional pagination controls on `/blocks`. | COMPLETED | `/blocks` now uses standard (non-reversed) pagination mode to match Torii’s 1-indexed paging semantics, and `src/pages/BlocksList.test.ts` asserts the page does not opt into reversed mode. |
| EX-023 | Decode Norito/base64 `TransactionRejectionReason` payloads into human-readable rejection messages. | COMPLETED | Transaction detail page now decodes `rejection_reason.encoded` (Norito bytes as hex) and falls back to `rejection_reason.json` (Norito archive base64), so UI shows a readable reason like “Validation failed: Instruction failed: Failed to find domain: bank2” instead of `TlJUM...`. |
| EX-024 | Fix KAIGI relays overview when telemetry counters are missing/reset; align KAIGI SSE parsing with Torii. | COMPLETED | KAIGI overview now floors registrations/reports totals using the relay list (avoids misleading all-zero snapshots), shows an Unknown status bucket when needed, parses `/v2/kaigi/relays/events` payloads correctly, and debounces overview refetch on incoming SSE events. |
| EX-025 | Restore pre-HDR light mode visuals by scoping HDR highlights to dark mode only. | COMPLETED | HDR/P3 overrides are now applied only when `html.dark` is active, so light theme stays on the SDR styling while dark theme keeps the HDR glow treatment. |
| EX-026 | Fix square-edged focus/hover highlights on rounded UI in dark mode. | COMPLETED | Removed the global `:focus-visible` `border-radius` override so focus rings keep each component’s intended rounded shape instead of forcing a 4px radius. |
| EX-027 | Add a documented nginx subpath deployment and enable subpath hosting for the Explorer build. | COMPLETED | Added `VITE_APP_BASE_PATH` support in `vite.config.mts`, switched router history to `import.meta.env.BASE_URL`, documented local+nginx deployment in `README.md`, and added `ops/nginx/explorer.subpath.locations.conf` serving the app at `/explorer-iroha2/` with `/v2/*` proxied to Torii (`127.0.0.1:29080`). |
| EX-028 | Center the home-page search icon vertically in the main search bubble. | COMPLETED | Adjusted the `lg` `SearchField` icon rendering so the magnifier sits in the exact vertical center (`src/features/search/SearchField.vue`). |
| EX-029 | Resolve merge conflicts from the `origin/i23` sync. | COMPLETED | Reconciled duplicate roadmap IDs by splitting the conflicting `EX-027` rows into `EX-027` + `EX-028` and removed merge markers from `ROADMAP.md`. |
| EX-030 | Remove legacy codec wording and field naming from Explorer UI/API mappings; keep Norito-only terminology. | COMPLETED | Instruction/rejection schemas now use Norito `encoded` bytes end-to-end (`Instruction.box.encoded`, `rejection_reason.encoded`), instruction detail UI + copy actions use `encoded` naming, localization keys/texts were renamed to `instructionEncodedPayload`/`copyEncodedPayload`, and roadmap/docs/agent guidance were updated to remove legacy codec terminology. |
| EX-031 | Remove lingering placeholder UI text from the Explorer frontend/localization packs. | COMPLETED | Removed unresolved localization placeholder artifacts (`__…__`/`PH0__`) in `dv`/`dz` locale entries, replaced them with concrete values, and cleared remaining TODO placeholder comments in UI/theme files. Verified with `pnpm typecheck` and targeted localization tests (`pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts`). |
| EX-032 | Prevent UI jumps/flashes on background data refresh (polling/SSE) by keeping previous content rendered while refetching. | COMPLETED | `setupAsyncData` now preserves the last fulfilled value via `useStaleState` and ensures watchers are attached before the initial run; `BaseTable` no longer blanks rows during refresh (shows a small overlay spinner instead), LatestTransactions keeps rendering existing rows while a refetch is pending, and Governance dashboard avoids blanking on auto-refresh by treating loading as “initial-only” when stale data is available. Added tests: `src/shared/utils/setup-async-data.test.ts`, `src/shared/ui/components/BaseTable.test.ts`. |
| EX-033 | Add an Econometrics page with per-asset metrics (distribution, concentration, activity). | COMPLETED | Added `/econometrics` page with per-asset input + query param (`?asset=...`). Snapshot metrics computed from `/v2/explorer/assets?definition=...`: holders, supply, coverage, Gini, HHI, effective holders, top-1/5/10, median/p90/p99, plus top-holders table. Activity section scans a recent sample of Transfer instructions to estimate turnover/velocity when payloads include an `object` and (optionally) amount fields. Added `src/shared/lib/econometrics.ts` + `src/shared/lib/econometrics.test.ts`. Wired nav via `src/shared/config.ts` + `src/app/router.ts` and added `econometrics.*` i18n keys to `src/shared/lib/localization/en.json`. |
| EX-034 | Expand Econometrics with entropy/Theil + Lorenz curve + supply dynamics + holder churn + multi-window velocity. | COMPLETED | Expanded `/econometrics` with Theil T + Shannon entropy (+ normalized + entropy-effective holders), Lorenz curve mini-chart, velocity windows (1h/24h/7d) with per-window coverage flags, Mint/Burn issuance windows + 30-day daily net issuance sparkline, and localStorage-based holder churn (retained/entered/exited + retention). Velocity/issuance scans detect instruction order (newest-first vs oldest-first) and guard progress updates so stale compute runs can’t clobber the UI. Added generic ISI extraction helpers in `src/shared/lib/econometrics.ts` and extended `src/shared/lib/econometrics.test.ts`. |
| EX-035 | Fix asset holders rendering when Torii returns explorer asset instances with non-legacy `AssetId` encoding (no `account@domain`). | COMPLETED | Updated `src/shared/api/schemas.ts` Asset payload to include `definition_id` + `account_id` and switched `/assets/:id`, `/accounts/:id` asset tables + `/econometrics` holders scan to rely on those fields instead of `AssetId.parse()`. Added `tests/e2e/assets-data.smoke.test.ts` regression coverage. |
| EX-036 | Stabilize e2e smoke tests under parallel Vitest runs (avoid 5s timeouts). | COMPLETED | Increased per-test timeouts to 20s in `tests/e2e/*.smoke.test.ts` to prevent flaky timeouts under load. |
| EX-037 | Expose authoritative asset-definition supply (total + governance locked/circulating) in Torii explorer payloads and wire into Econometrics. | COMPLETED | Torii explorer asset-definition DTO now includes `total_quantity` for all assets plus `locked_quantity`/`circulating_quantity` for the governance voting asset (bond escrow). Econometrics now displays these supply fields, adds supply coverage (scanned/definition), and uses circulating/definition supply as the velocity denominator when available (fallbacks to scanned holder supply). Updated `src/shared/api/schemas.ts` + tests. |
| EX-038 | Compute econometrics activity (velocity/issuance windows) server-side in Torii to avoid scan limits and payload heuristics. | COMPLETED | Torii now exposes `GET /v2/explorer/asset-definitions/{definition_id}/econometrics` returning committed-only Transfer/Mint/Burn aggregates for 1h/24h/7d windows + 30d daily net issuance; the Econometrics UI prefers this endpoint and falls back to client-side instruction scans when unavailable. |
| EX-039 | Improve Econometrics UX (asset list + click-to-compute) and expand `/assets` to also list asset instances. | COMPLETED | `/econometrics` now includes a paginated asset-definition list; clicking a row updates `?asset=...` and triggers compute immediately (no Compute button needed). `/assets` gained an “Asset holders” tab that lists asset instances (definition + domain + account + value) with an optional holder filter. Added coverage in `src/pages/Econometrics.test.ts` + `src/pages/AssetsList.test.ts`. |
| EX-040 | Compute econometrics snapshot (holders + distribution metrics) server-side in Torii (Gini/HHI/Theil/entropy/top-N/quantiles) so results aren’t biased by client scan limits. | COMPLETED | Torii now exposes `GET /v2/explorer/asset-definitions/{definition_id}/snapshot` returning holders total, total supply, top holders, Lorenz curve points, and distribution metrics computed from the world state; the Econometrics UI prefers this endpoint and falls back to client-side holder scans when unavailable. |
| EX-041 | Restore instruction/transaction detail rendering when Torii exposes Norito bytes as `scale` (instead of `encoded`). | COMPLETED | Torii returns `r#box.scale` for instructions and `rejection_reason.scale` for rejected transactions on some deployments; the explorer now accepts both, normalizes to `encoded`, and has schema regression tests to prevent silent instruction table blanking. |
| EX-042 | Add domain/owner filters to the Econometrics asset-definition list. | COMPLETED | `/econometrics` asset list now supports `domain` + `owned_by` filtering with the same labels/placeholders as `/assets`. |
| EX-043 | Avoid auto-refresh shifting paginated tables on SSE updates (transactions/instructions). | COMPLETED | The Transactions/Instructions tables now only auto-refetch from their SSE streams when the user is on the latest page (prevents “jumping” while browsing older pages). Added unit coverage for the gating logic. |
| EX-044 | Add Nakamoto coefficients + nearest-rank quantiles to asset snapshot distribution metrics. | COMPLETED | Torii snapshot distribution now includes `nakamoto_33/51/67` and uses nearest-rank quantiles for `p90/p99`; the Econometrics UI displays the Nakamoto metrics and matches quantile semantics for client-side fallback scans. |
| EX-045 | Restore polling semantics for `setupAsyncData({ interval })` (keep stale content rendered while polling). | COMPLETED | `setupAsyncData` now uses the provided `interval` as a real polling period (not just error-retry). Pages that already passed `{ interval: 5000 }` (e.g. `/blocks` list + telemetry metrics) now refresh automatically without blanking due to stale-state rendering. |
| EX-046 | Stop emitting `scale` in Torii explorer DTOs (Norito bytes are `encoded` only). | COMPLETED | Renamed `ExplorerInstructionBoxDto.scale` → `encoded` and `ExplorerTransactionRejectionDto.scale` → `encoded` in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/explorer.rs` and added unit assertions that the serialized JSON contains `encoded` and not `scale`. |
| EX-047 | Scope Econometrics local churn snapshots by selected node/network. | COMPLETED | Churn snapshots stored in `localStorage` are now keyed by the active Torii base URL so switching node presets doesn’t compare holder sets across different networks. |
| EX-048 | Enrich the Econometrics asset-definition picker list with useful columns. | COMPLETED | The `/econometrics` asset-definition list now shows instances count, definition total supply (when present), and definition owner, making it easier to pick the right asset without drilling into details. |
| EX-049 | Deduplicate default error toasts during polling/retry refresh. | COMPLETED | `setupAsyncData` now suppresses repeated identical errors until a successful fetch occurs again (prevents toast spam when a node is down). Added unit coverage. |
| EX-050 | Use stable row keys for tables (avoid DOM churn on refresh). | COMPLETED | `BaseTable` now accepts `rowKey` and keying is wired for the auto-refreshing block/transaction/instruction lists. |
| EX-051 | Avoid scroll-jumps on background refresh by pausing auto-refetch while scrolled down. | COMPLETED | Transactions/Instructions tables now defer SSE-triggered refetches when the user is scrolled down (shows inline “New data available” with Load). Blocks list polling now respects `setupAsyncData.pollWhen` to avoid shifting while reading. Added unit coverage. |
| EX-052 | Prevent SSE live-event lists from jumping while the user scrolls. | COMPLETED | KAIGI relay live-events now preserve internal scroll position on prepend. ZK proof stream adjusts window scroll to keep the viewport stable when new proofs arrive while scrolled down. Added unit coverage for both. |
| EX-053 | Add a `/blocks` “New data available” banner when auto-refresh is paused (avoid silent staleness). | COMPLETED | `/blocks` now runs a lightweight background probe while scrolled down on page 1; if the latest remote height exceeds the displayed max height, it shows an inline “New data available” + Load banner (Load scrolls to top + refetches). Added unit coverage in `src/pages/BlocksList.test.ts`. |
| EX-054 | Apply stable `rowKey` to all `BaseTable` usages (avoid DOM churn across the app). | COMPLETED | All `BaseTable` call sites now pass a stable `rowKey` (IDs/hashes/heights), including detail pages and telemetry tables, avoiding index-keyed DOM churn on refresh and pagination changes. |
| EX-055 | Translate `table.newDataAvailable` and `table.load` across all locales (and add a regression test). | COMPLETED | Added `table.newDataAvailable` + `table.load` to every shipped locale JSON and added a regression test in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts` to prevent fallback-to-English regressions. |
| EX-056 | Make `setupAsyncData({ interval, immediate: false })` still poll (timer starts even without an immediate fetch). | COMPLETED | `setupAsyncData` now always starts the interval timer when `interval` is provided; `immediate: false` only defers the first fetch. Added unit coverage in `src/shared/utils/setup-async-data.test.ts`. |
| EX-057 | Avoid index-keyed `v-for` churn in core UI components (tabs/dropdowns/nav/home stats). | COMPLETED | Replaced `:key="i"` with stable keys (`value`, `to`, `i18nKey`) in `BaseTabs`, dropdowns, the nav menu, and home stats widgets to avoid DOM reuse bugs when lists change. |
| EX-058 | Add a blocks SSE stream in Torii and use it to refresh `/blocks` without jumpy polling. | COMPLETED | Torii (`../iroha`) now exposes `GET /v2/explorer/blocks/stream` emitting committed blocks as Norito JSON via SSE. The Explorer `useBlockStream` listens via `EventSource`, and `/blocks` uses the stream to refetch when at the top or show the “New data available” banner while scrolled down (polling remains as fallback). |
| EX-059 | Use the blocks SSE stream for the home “Latest blocks” widget and suppress polling while the stream is connected. | COMPLETED | `LatestBlocks` now connects to `/v2/explorer/blocks/stream`, refetches on new block events, and disables 5s polling while `EventSource` is connected (polling remains as fallback when the stream is unsupported/closed). Added unit coverage in `src/widgets/latest-blocks/LatestBlocks.test.ts`. |
| EX-060 | Auto-detect Torii econometrics endpoints instead of requiring an explicit runtime-config flag. | COMPLETED | Econometrics now tries the Torii `/snapshot` + `/econometrics` endpoints by default and disables them only when they return `NOT_FOUND` (runtime-config can still force-disable by setting `toriiEconometricsEndpointsEnabled=false`). Updated unit coverage in `src/pages/Econometrics.test.ts`. |
| EX-061 | Make runtime config loading work under subpath deployments (`BASE_URL`). | COMPLETED | `loadRuntimeConfig()` now fetches `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}config.json` and falls back to `/config.json` for root-hosted configs. Covered by `src/shared/runtime-config.test.ts`. |
| EX-062 | Make node switching reliable: reactive Torii base + SSE streams reconnect on node changes. | COMPLETED | `src/shared/api/index.ts` now keeps Torii base URL in reactive state (so UI hints update), and all Explorer SSE consumers (`useBlockStream`, transactions/instructions streams, sumeragi/telemetry streams) now use computed URLs so they auto-reconnect when the node changes. |
| EX-063 | Keep “New data available” banners visible while scrolled (sticky banners). | COMPLETED | Pending-refresh banners in `/blocks`, `TransactionsTable`, and `InstructionsTable` are now `position: sticky` so users see the “New data available” affordance even while reading lower rows. |
| EX-064 | Reduce redundant polling when SSE streams are connected. | COMPLETED | `LatestTransactions` now pauses its 5s polling interval while the `/v2/explorer/transactions/stream` SSE connection is `OPEN` (polling remains as fallback when the stream is closed/unavailable). |
| EX-065 | Make node switching refresh the active page without a full reload. | COMPLETED | `src/app/App.vue` now keys `RouterView` on the active Torii base URL so route components remount (and refetch) when the user changes nodes via the header selector. |
| EX-066 | Localize Econometrics navigation labels across all locales. | COMPLETED | Added `econometrics.nav/title/compute` to every shipped JSON locale and added a regression test in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts`. |
| EX-067 | Remove unused programmatic locale overrides now that JSON locale packs ship. | COMPLETED | Trimmed `src/shared/lib/localization/index.ts` to only keep programmatic poetic locales (`akk`/`egy`) and rely on JSON locale files for all other locales (reduces bundle/memory churn). |
| EX-068 | Document runtime `config.json` and provide a tracked example. | COMPLETED | Added `public/config.json.example`, documented `config.json` loading + keys in `README.md`, and gitignored `public/config.json`. |
| EX-069 | Add `/v2/telemetry/live` SSE in Torii and wire the Explorer to consume it (reduce polling + enable live peer status updates). | COMPLETED | Backend: implemented `GET /v2/telemetry/live` (Norito JSON SSE) emitting `peer_info`/`peer_status`/`network_status` plus a `first` bootstrap snapshot. Route wiring + OpenAPI + smoke coverage were revalidated in `../iroha` (including `/v2/gov/stream`) on 2026-02-18. Frontend: `useTelemetryMetrics` consumes the stream and pauses polling while connected; `/telemetry` shows stream indicators for consensus + nodes. |
| EX-070 | Decouple shared composables from the first consumer scope so SSE/polling keeps running until the last consumer unmounts. | COMPLETED | Shared telemetry/governance/sumeragi singleton composables now initialize inside detached `effectScope(true)` instances with explicit teardown, so SSE/polling survive creator unmounts and only stop after the final consumer leaves. Added multi-scope regression tests in `useTelemetryMetrics.test.ts` and `useGovernanceEvents.test.ts`, and re-ran targeted composable suites + `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-071 | Make Econometrics resilient when Torii snapshot/econometrics endpoints fail at runtime (network/CORS); fall back to holder scan + activity scan instead of hard failure. | COMPLETED | Reproduced on `https://explorer.soramitsu.io/econometrics?asset=PKR%23sbp`: browser CORS blocked Torii snapshot endpoint and UI failed with `Failed to fetch`. Frontend now catches snapshot fetch throws and falls back to holder scan (`src/pages/Econometrics.vue`) with regression coverage in `src/pages/Econometrics.test.ts`. SBP ingress nginx now re-adds Torii CORS headers on cached `/v2/explorer/asset-definitions/:id/{snapshot,econometrics}` locations, and CORS gate coverage was expanded in `pk-deploy/scripts/gates/check-cors-contract.sh`. |
| EX-072 | Fix Econometrics velocity/issuance table header overlap on mid-width desktop viewports. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/pages/Econometrics.vue` table grid CSS to use responsive `minmax(..., fr)` column tracks, added `min-width: 0` cell guards, and enabled header wrapping with `overflow-wrap: break-word` so labels like `Turnover (amount/supply)` and `Velocity/day (turnover/window)` no longer spill into adjacent columns (reproduced + validated at `1280x800` on `https://explorer.soramitsu.io/econometrics?asset=PKR%23sbp`). |
| EX-073 | Refresh light mode app-wide with a crisp-contrast visual system pass (tokens + shared components + key pages). | COMPLETED | Retuned light-theme token/shadow maps in `src/shared/ui/styles/theme.scss` (higher text/border contrast, cleaner surface hierarchy, reduced neumorphic haze), refined light chrome in `src/app/App.vue` + `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue`, and updated shared/page surfaces (`BaseContentBlock`, `BaseButton`, `SearchField`, `HomePage`, `HomePageInfo`, `KaigiRelays`) to use crisper borders, restrained shadows, and lower blur while keeping Sora + dark-mode/HDR branches intact. Verified with `pnpm typecheck` and targeted tests: `HomePage.test.ts`, `SearchField.test.ts`, `BaseTable.test.ts`, `KaigiRelayEvents.test.ts`. |
| EX-074 | Add consistent top spacing under the header for all non-home pages. | COMPLETED | Moved the top gap into `src/shared/ui/components/BasePageLayout.vue` (`padding-top: size(1)` on small screens, `size(1.5)` from `md`), then removed the `/blocks`-only top margin in `src/pages/BlocksList.vue` so `/blocks` keeps its existing visual spacing while all other non-home pages inherit the same gap. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/BlocksList.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-075 | Align `/accounts` filter row side spacing with table content in the same block. | COMPLETED | Added responsive horizontal padding on `src/pages/AccountsList.vue` for `accounts-list-page__filters` (`size(2)` default, `size(3)` on `sm`, back to `size(2)` on `md+`) to match table row side insets in the same card. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-076 | Align `/governance` body content side spacing with table/card insets. | COMPLETED | Added responsive side insets in `src/pages/GovernanceDashboard.vue` for `governance-page__panel`, `governance-page__stats`, and `governance-page__form` (`size(2)` default, `size(3)` on `sm`, back to `size(2)` on `md+`) and restored locks table row horizontal padding to the same spacing in `governance-page__locks-table .content-row`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/GovernanceDashboard.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-077 | Add side insets for governance fallback prompt text blocks. | COMPLETED | Applied `governance-page__message` to governance fallback/prompt row-text blocks in `src/pages/GovernanceDashboard.vue` (including “Submit a referendum ID…” and “Enter a proposal ID…” prompts) and added responsive insets (`size(2)` default, `size(3)` on `sm`, back to `size(2)` on `md+`). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/GovernanceDashboard.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-078 | Make top header controls responsive so buttons never overflow outside the bar on medium-wide screens. | COMPLETED | Updated header breakpoints so desktop controls/nav no longer engage too early: `MobileMenu` now hides at `xl` (instead of `lg`), `NavigationMenu` now appears at `xl` (instead of `lg`), and `TheHeader` desktop-only controls now appear at `xl` with tighter `xl` button gap (`size(1)`, returning to `size(2)` at `xxl`). This keeps the compact menu path active until there is enough width and prevents top-bar overflow. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-079 | Prevent header button overflow at sub-xxl widths by delaying full desktop controls. | COMPLETED | Delayed full desktop header mode to `xxl`: `MobileMenu` now hides at `xxl`, while `NavigationMenu` and `TheHeader` desktop-only controls now appear at `xxl`. This keeps compact/mobile controls active through `xl` widths and prevents button overflow outside the top bar on narrower desktops. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-080 | Make header controls progressively responsive (hide only heavier buttons first, not everything). | COMPLETED | Implemented staged visibility in `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue`: theme toggle now appears from `lg`, language dropdown from `xl`, and node selector only from `xxl` (split into dedicated classes). Kept `MobileMenu` visible until `xxl` so hidden actions remain accessible, and kept `NavigationMenu` at `xxl` to avoid reintroducing overflow pressure. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-081 | Tune header controls to show most actions while clipping overflow safely. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` so the header button row uses flex + overflow clipping (`min-width: 0; overflow: hidden`) and stages visibility as requested: theme + language from `lg`, node selector from `xxl`. This keeps most controls visible while preventing spillover outside the top bar. `NavigationMenu` remains at `xxl` and `MobileMenu` stays available until `xxl` for hidden actions. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-082 | Keep language dropdown anchored to the language button after responsive header reflow. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.vue` to teleport the language list to `body` and position it with fixed coordinates derived from the trigger button (`getBoundingClientRect`), with live repositioning on open/resize/scroll and RTL-aware left/right anchoring. Updated `src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts` to assert teleported dropdown behavior under the new `body` anchor. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-083 | Keep most header buttons always rendered and clip overflow inside the top bar. | COMPLETED | Removed per-button desktop visibility wrappers in `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` so node/theme/language controls stay rendered, made the header nav/buttons lanes clip overflow (`min-width: 0; overflow: hidden`) with right-aligned control clipping, and restored `NavigationMenu` visibility from `xl` while keeping overflow contained (`src/features/navigation/NavigationMenu.vue`). Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-084 | Make header controls truly window-responsive (fit-to-width) rather than breakpoint-only clipping. | COMPLETED | `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` now measures real header width (ResizeObserver + `requestAnimationFrame`) and applies priority fitting on every resize/locale change: start with all controls visible, hide nav if it overflows, then hide lower-priority controls (`NodeSettings` → `LangDropdown` → `ThemeSwitcher`) only when button lane still overflows. `MobileMenu` is forced visible whenever anything is collapsed via `mobile-menu_force-visible` (`src/features/mobile-menu/MobileMenu.vue`) so hidden actions remain accessible. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-085 | Keep language dropdown list anchored to the language button after responsive header relayouts. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.vue` to position the teleported list with measured fixed `left/top` coordinates (viewport clamped) based on trigger + dropdown rects, and added `ResizeObserver` tracking on both trigger and dropdown so anchor position updates when layout shifts. Added regression test coverage in `src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts` for trigger-based placement and re-ran `pnpm exec vitest run src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts` plus `pnpm build`. |
| EX-086 | Re-arrange top bar to never hide controls; wrap to multiple rows when one row is too narrow. | COMPLETED | Header now keeps nav + action controls always rendered: removed desktop-only wrappers and hide breakpoints in `TheHeader`, made nav/buttons lanes flex-wrap, and kept `MobileMenu` visible at all sizes so no controls disappear. Also relaxed the node-selector button nowrap rule on small screens so long localized labels wrap instead of pushing outside the bar. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-087 | Reduce avoidable top-bar line breaks by separating logo/actions from nav into a two-row responsive layout. | COMPLETED | Refactored `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` to CSS grid with explicit rows: row 1 (`logo` + controls), row 2 (full-width navigation). This stops nav/control width contention that caused unnecessary third-line wrapping on medium desktop widths (e.g. `/accounts/:id`) while still keeping all controls visible. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-088 | Prevent controls-lane squeezing that causes theme/language buttons to spill into an extra row on narrower viewports. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` to stack header lanes by default (`logo`, then `controls`, then `nav`) and only switch to side-by-side `logo + controls` from `md` upward. This removes the narrow-width squeeze that was isolating theme/language on an extra controls row. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-089 | Prevent controls from splitting into inefficient extra rows by prioritizing compact one-line packing. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` so the controls lane is `nowrap` with priority sizing (node selector gets flexible width; icon controls stay fixed). Added node-selector label truncation in `src/features/node-settings/NodeSettings.vue` and delayed language button text/arrow expansion to `xl` in `src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.vue`. This keeps theme/language from being pushed onto their own row on medium widths. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-090 | Remove obsolete overflow (`...`) control from the non-home header now that all controls stay visible. | COMPLETED | Removed `MobileMenu` from `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` so non-home pages no longer show the `...` top-bar control; retained direct controls only (`NodeSettings`, `ThemeSwitcher`, `LangDropdown`). Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts` expectations accordingly. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts src/pages/HomePage.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-091 | Eliminate forced three-lane stacking on sub-`md` widths so header remains space-efficient (two lanes: top controls + nav). | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` to keep `logo + controls` side-by-side at all widths (with nav as the second row), removing the forced stacked middle controls lane. Tightened small-width packing via smaller base logo width in `src/widgets/header/HeaderLogo.vue` and reduced node-selector button padding in `src/features/node-settings/NodeSettings.vue` so node/theme/language remain in the top controls lane more reliably. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts src/pages/HomePage.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-092 | Fix `/accounts/:id` authority filter overflow caused by fixed transaction row heights. | COMPLETED | Scoped the account-details compact-height override in `src/pages/AccountDetails.vue` from `.transactions-table .content-row` to `.transactions-table__container .content-row`, so only transaction body rows stay compact while filter rows keep natural height. This resolves authority filter text/input overflow on account details pages. Verified with `pnpm build` and targeted regression checks (`HomePage`, `TheHeader`, `LangDropdown` tests). |
| EX-093 | Prevent `/accounts/:id` transactions panel from overflowing horizontally on narrow/intermediate widths. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/pages/AccountDetails.vue` to use container-relative widths in account layout/transactions (`100%` on small screens, `%` at `lg`) instead of viewport widths (`vw`), and removed per-row `vw` widths in `account-details__transactions-table_short .content-row` (now `width/max-width: 100%`). This keeps account transactions within the screen across breakpoint transitions. Verified with `pnpm build` and targeted regression checks (`HomePage`, `TheHeader`, `LangDropdown` tests). |
| EX-094 | Prevent node selector from over-expanding and consuming most of the header controls row. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` to stop node selector flex-grow (`flex: 0 1 size(28)`), apply explicit width bounds (`min-width: size(14)`, `max-width: size(34)`, `size(38)` at `xxl`), and keep existing truncation behavior from `NodeSettings`. This prevents the node button from taking most of the controls lane while preserving compact layout. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts src/pages/HomePage.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-095 | Make header node selector compact by default (avoid oversized footprint in controls lane). | COMPLETED | Tightened node control sizing in `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` by removing growth behavior and adding stricter max widths (`size(24)` default, `size(28)` at `xxl`) while retaining truncation. Updated `src/features/node-settings/NodeSettings.vue` so the inner button is `width: auto` with capped label width (`size(20)`) instead of forcing full-width. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/widgets/header/TheHeader.test.ts src/features/switch-lang/LangDropdown.test.ts src/pages/HomePage.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-096 | Remove compressed-address warning copy from account details UI. | COMPLETED | Removed the rendered warning paragraph (`accounts.accountAddressCompressedWarning`) from `src/pages/AccountDetails.vue` compressed-address card and deleted the now-unused `account-details__address-warning` style block. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-097 | Fix copy-button placement for account-address and compressed fields on account details. | COMPLETED | Refactored `src/pages/AccountDetails.vue` address cards so both canonical account-address and compressed variants use the same header-aligned `CopyIcon` control (instead of mixed inline icon vs text button), keeping copy actions consistently positioned and compact across breakpoints. Also consolidated address copy handling into one function with context-aware success toasts. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-098 | Remove unnecessary left whitespace before header node control in the top controls lane. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/widgets/header/TheHeader.vue` controls container (`app-header__buttons`) to shrink-to-content (`width: fit-content; max-width: 100%`) and anchor right (`justify-self: end; margin-inline-start: auto`) instead of stretching full-width. This removes the visually wasted left gap before the node button while preserving right-edge alignment of controls. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-099 | Make dark-mode hover highlights respect rounded card geometry on account/details surfaces. | COMPLETED | Updated shared card styling in `src/shared/ui/components/BaseContentBlock.vue` by isolating blend compositing (`isolation: isolate`) and applying `border-radius: inherit` on the animated `::before` sheen layer. This prevents square-edged hover highlight artifacts in dark mode and keeps highlights clipped to rounded card corners. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-100 | Show multisig instructions with a friendly label instead of generic `Custom` in transaction instruction views. | COMPLETED | `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.vue` now detects multisig-shaped custom payloads (`Register`/`Propose`/`Approve` with account-bearing bodies) and renders a friendly `Multisig` kind label in instruction rows and detail metadata, while keeping raw API/filter kinds unchanged (`Custom` remains the filter value). Added `transactions.multisig` localization for all shipped JSON locale packs plus poetic overrides in `akk`/`egy`, and added localization regression coverage (`src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts`) to keep `transactions.*` key parity across locales. Existing instruction rendering coverage remains in `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` for multisig custom + non-multisig custom paths. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-101 | Add Sora Nexus dataspaces support via Torii-first API contract and ship an Explorer `/dataspaces` page. | COMPLETED | Torii now exposes `GET /v2/nexus/dataspaces/accounts/{literal}/summary` (literal resolution + UAID/bindings/manifest/portfolio/consensus joins) with route + OpenAPI wiring in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii`. Explorer now consumes it via `fetchNexusDataspacesAccountSummary`, includes schema coverage (`src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts`), API URL coverage (`src/shared/api/index.test.ts`), and ships a new `/dataspaces` page (`src/pages/Dataspaces.vue` + `src/pages/Dataspaces.test.ts`) linked in router/menu/localization. Verification now also includes an HTTP integration test for the new Torii endpoint (`../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/tests/nexus_dataspaces_summary.rs`, command: `cargo test -p iroha_torii --test nexus_dataspaces_summary -- --nocapture`) in addition to helper-unit coverage (`cargo test -p iroha_torii nexus_dataspaces_summary_tests -- --nocapture`) and frontend checks (`pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts src/shared/api/index.test.ts src/pages/Dataspaces.test.ts src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts`, `pnpm build`). Follow-up gap closure adds Torii negative-path HTTP coverage (invalid literal/empty literal/invalid `address_format`/missing account/`nexus_disabled`), Dataspaces page edge-case tests (required input, generic failure, in-flight disable, selected-row reset), and locale-key parity checks plus localized (non-English) `dataspaces.*` values across all shipped JSON locale packs. |
| EX-102 | Restore rich poetic programmatic locale layers for `akk`/`egy` and extend them to new UI areas. | COMPLETED | Reinstated the broader Akkadian/Hieroglyphic semantic locale overrides in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.ts` (home/search/widgets/transactions/governance/telemetry/KAIGI/SoraFS/settings) and added poetic `dataspaces.*` overrides so these programmatic locales no longer fall back to plain English for newer pages. Follow-up refinement replaced remaining plain-English-heavy Akkadian account/dataspace phrasing with semantic poetic copy (not phonetic transliteration). Added regression checks in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts` to ensure core poetic labels remain present. |
| EX-103 | Fill missing `econometrics.*` localization keys across all shipped JSON locales and enforce key parity. | COMPLETED | Backfilled the missing 77 econometrics leaf keys for every shipped JSON locale (`src/shared/lib/localization/*.json`) and completed targeted cleanup for fallback-heavy locales (Amharic/Dzongkha/Divehi/Azerbaijani) so non-technical econometrics labels no longer fall back to English. Added regression coverage in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts` to enforce `econometrics.*` key parity against `en.json`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-104 | Improve failed transaction diagnostics by decoding account-level `FindError` payloads into readable identifiers. | COMPLETED | Extended `src/shared/api/rejection-reason.ts` to decode `FindError::Account` (`publicKey@domain`) and `FindError::PublicKey`, so transaction details show actionable failure reasons (example `c9d2df...`: `Failed to find account: ...@sbp`) instead of `FindError(3)`. Added regression coverage in `src/shared/api/rejection-reason.test.ts` (exact payload + malformed fallback). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/api/rejection-reason.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-105 | Redesign `/telemetry` to an ethstats-style live network board (node cards, latency/ping proxies, propagation graphs, and richer rollups). | COMPLETED | `/telemetry` now includes an ethstats-style “Live network pulse” section in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.vue`: KPI tiles (live/reporting/lagging nodes, p95 commit latency, propagation spread), rolling sparklines (median commit latency, propagation spread, queue pressure), and compact per-node cards (status, block delta, commit-latency ping proxy, estimated propagation, queue usage bar). Added telemetry math/render helpers (`calculateQueueFillPercent`, `calculatePercentile`, `calculatePropagationSpread`, `buildSparklinePoints`, `formatLatencyMs`) in `src/shared/ui/utils/node-telemetry.ts` with regression coverage in `src/shared/ui/utils/node-telemetry.test.ts`, expanded page checks in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts`, and added new telemetry labels in `src/shared/lib/localization/en.json`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/utils/node-telemetry.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-106 | Close ethstats telemetry gaps with real RTT + observed block propagation data and a map/graph board mode. | COMPLETED | Upstream Torii (`../iroha`) now emits real `/status` RTT metrics (`status_rtt`, avg, p95) in peer status, tracks per-block propagation spread across peers, serves `GET /v2/telemetry/propagation`, and includes propagation in `/v2/telemetry/live` (`first` bootstrap + `propagation` delta kind). Explorer now parses the expanded telemetry schemas (`PeerStatus`, `PeerPropagation`, live SSE union), fetches propagation snapshots in `usePeersTelemetry`, uses true RTT/observed propagation on `/telemetry` with derived fallback, adds a user-selectable history window (24/48/96 points), and upgrades map mode to interactive pan/zoom + hover tooltip + marker-to-card selection. New telemetry strings are now localized natively across every shipped JSON locale pack (no English placeholder keys left for this feature). Verification: `cargo test -p iroha_torii --features telemetry,app_api --lib peers_status_reflects_metrics_updates -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii --features telemetry,app_api --lib peers_status_computes_propagation_from_first_seen_timestamp -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii --features telemetry,app_api --lib latency_window_calculates_average_and_percentile -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii --features telemetry,app_api --lib latency_window_keeps_latest_samples_only -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii --features telemetry,app_api --test app_api_router_smoke app_api_router_smoke -- --nocapture`, `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/utils/node-telemetry.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/api/index.test.ts src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-107 | Make transaction instruction type immediately obvious on instruction detail links (`/transactions/:hash?instruction=...`). | COMPLETED | Updated `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.vue` so instruction kind is now surfaced prominently in the detail header (`data-test=\"instruction-detail-kind\"`) and rendered as a high-contrast badge/chip in both detail header and table rows, making the type visible at a glance even when landing via `?instruction=` deep links. Kept detail metadata `Kind` field aligned with the same computed label source, and expanded `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` assertions for the new header-kind indicator (`Register` + `Multisig`). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-108 | Prevent `/telemetry` from showing `0` live nodes when peer-detail telemetry is empty but network metrics still report peers. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.vue` live KPI computation to fall back to `metrics.peers` when the peer-detail rows are empty (`peers_info`/`peers_status` unavailable), so `Live nodes` and `Reporting nodes` reflect network-level peer count instead of `0`. Added regression coverage in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` (`falls back to network peer count when peer details are unavailable`) and normalized telemetry test metrics fixture setup. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-109 | Use gossip topology hints (`connected_peers`) to estimate live node counts when only partial peer telemetry is available. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.vue` to include gossip-derived topology in KPI estimation: when partial peer rows exist, `connected_peers` IDs are deduplicated against known peer public keys and used to expand `Live nodes` totals/online counts (with `metrics.peers` still acting as an upper fallback). This ensures a connected node can represent discovered peers from gossip even when full status rows are missing. Added regression coverage in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` (single-row + three gossip peers now renders `Live nodes` as `4 / 4` while `Reporting nodes` remains `1`). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-110 | Surface clear failed-transaction error messages end-to-end (Torii-provided human text + frontend fallback decoding for current payloads). | COMPLETED | Reproduced rejected tx `14b6d3a4...` (only encoded Norito bytes in production payload), then patched Torii (`../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/explorer.rs`) so transaction detail now emits `rejection_reason.message` with nested validation/instruction context (including repetition/find details). Frontend now parses optional `rejection_reason.message` in `src/shared/api/schemas.ts`, prefers it on `/transactions/:hash` (`src/pages/TransactionDetails.vue`), keeps backward-compatible decoding by extending `src/shared/api/rejection-reason.ts` with repetition-id extraction (`Repeated instruction for id: sbp`) for older Torii responses, and treats opaque Torii tag-only strings (e.g. `InstructionExecutionError(4)`) as low-signal so decoded fallback text is shown instead. Added/updated tests in `../iroha` explorer DTO tests (`transaction_detail_includes_rejection_reason`, `transaction_detail_includes_repetition_error_context_in_message`), `src/shared/api/rejection-reason.test.ts`, `src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts`, and `src/pages/TransactionDetails.test.ts`. Verified with `cargo test -p iroha_torii transaction_detail_includes_rejection_reason -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii transaction_detail_includes_repetition_error_context_in_message -- --nocapture`, `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/TransactionDetails.test.ts src/shared/api/rejection-reason.test.ts src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-111 | Keep long Norito instruction payloads inside a responsive detail box on `/transactions/:hash?instruction=...`. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.vue` encoded-payload section to render inside a dedicated responsive box (`instructions-detail__encoded-box`) with `minmax(0, 1fr)` layout, full-width bounded `<pre>`, viewport-capped height, and wrapped/scrollable long Norito strings so payloads stay within screen bounds. Added regression assertions in `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` for the encoded payload container. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |

Replaced ZK telemetry’s previous `padding: size(1.5) 0` rule that forced zero horizontal inset. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/ZkTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-113 | Add horizontal padding for the `/kaigi/relays` domain-metrics empty-state text (“No domain metrics yet”). | COMPLETED | Updated `src/pages/KaigiRelays.vue` to render the fallback with `kaigi-relays-page__empty row-text` and added `&__empty { padding: size(2.5) size(3); }` so the message has the same side inset as table content. Verified with `pnpm build`. |
| EX-114 | Fix remaining table-adjacent empty-state `row-text` fallback(s) lacking horizontal padding. | COMPLETED | Added side insets to every remaining matching fallback: `src/pages/BlockDetails.vue` now uses `display: block; padding-inline: size(4);` for `.block-details__transactions_empty` (replacing margin-left-only), and `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.vue` now applies the same block-level logical side padding for `.nodes-telemetry-page__ethstats-empty`, `__rbc-evictions-empty`, `__nexus-staking-empty`, and `__lane-governance-empty`. Verified with `pnpm build`. |

Added regression coverage in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` (`renders sumeragi chain and block producer details`). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |

Kept the same Torii payload semantics. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-117 | Prevent `/telemetry` Nodes table from showing empty while stream is connected but peer telemetry payloads are unavailable. | COMPLETED | Reproduced on production (`https://explorer.soramitsu.io/telemetry` / `https://torii.soramitsu.io`): metrics reported peers while `/v2/telemetry/peers-info` + `/v2/telemetry/propagation` returned empty arrays. Added Torii-root `/peers` fallback in frontend (`fetchOnlinePeers` + `usePeersTelemetry`) that hydrates placeholder node rows (parsed `public_key@host:port` entries, preserves real telemetry rows when available). Added regression coverage in `src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` (fallback hydration + non-override behavior) and API coverage in `src/shared/api/index.test.ts` for `/peers`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/api/index.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-118 | Add explicit telemetry trust badges on `/telemetry` (source + sample age + freshness) so fallback/snapshot modes are clear. | COMPLETED | `/telemetry` now shows per-section trust badges (Live pulse, Sumeragi consensus, Nodes): stream state, data source (`Live SSE`/`Snapshot`/`Fallback /peers`/`Mixed`), and sample age with freshness labels (`fresh`/`delayed`/`stale`/`unknown`). `usePeersTelemetry` now exposes `peerDataSource`, `lastPeerSampleAtMs`, and `fallbackPeersCount`; `useSumeragiStatus` now exposes `lastUpdatedAtMs`. Added UI/composable regression coverage (`src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts`, `src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts`, `src/shared/ui/composables/useSumeragiStatus.test.ts`) plus API coverage remains in `src/shared/api/index.test.ts`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/useSumeragiStatus.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/api/index.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-119 | Refine telemetry trust UX clarity (`live` vs `snapshot` source accuracy + explicit fallback warning + freshness scale hint). | COMPLETED | `usePeersTelemetry` now tracks row origin as `live`/`snapshot`/`fallback` (with live precedence over late snapshot refreshes), reports `MIXED` when provenance is combined, and keeps `lastPeerSampleAtMs`/`fallbackPeersCount` aligned with that provenance. `/telemetry` now shows freshness-scale hint (`Fresh <= 15s · Delayed <= 60s`) and an explicit fallback warning when `/peers` data is being used (`FALLBACK`/`MIXED`). Added regression coverage for mixed-source classification in `src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` and fallback notice rendering in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/useSumeragiStatus.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-120 | Show concrete ISI names for `Custom` instructions in transaction details/lists by deriving them from payload wire metadata. | COMPLETED | `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.vue` now resolves custom instruction labels from structured Norito metadata in priority order: multisig-friendly label, `wire_id` (`json.wire_id`, `payload.wire_id`, `payload.value.wire_id`), then non-placeholder `payload.variant`, with conservative legacy single-key fallback and final fallback to `Custom`. This fixes production tx `04c5deb6...` (`SubmitOfflineToOnlineTransfer` now shown instead of generic `Custom`). Added regression coverage in `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` for `wire_id`-derived + `variant`-derived custom labels while preserving non-ISI payload fallback to `Custom`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-121 | Add telemetry ops-console interactions on `/telemetry` (quick filters, pin/compare panel, raw-event drawer) with cyberpunk-styled controls. | COMPLETED | `/telemetry` Live network pulse now includes quick filter chips (`All`/`Online`/`Lagging`/`Unsupported`), per-node pin/compare actions with a side-by-side compare panel, and a toggleable raw-events drawer. `src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.ts` now exposes a bounded `recentEvents` feed (snapshot/SSE/fallback event kinds + payloads) consumed by the drawer. Added regression coverage in `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` (filters + pin/compare + drawer flow) and `src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` (event feed capture/order). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-122 | Emit concrete ISI names from Torii explorer instruction DTOs when instruction kind is currently classified as `Custom`. | COMPLETED | Updated `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/explorer.rs` so unmapped/custom-classified instructions now expose concrete ISI labels derived from `wire_id`: `ExplorerInstructionDto.kind` uses wire-tail labels (e.g., `SubmitOfflineToOnlineTransfer` / `AddSignatory`) while preserving canonical filter classification (`ExplorerInstructionKind::Custom`), and fallback structured payloads now set `payload.variant` to the wire-tail label instead of `Unknown`. Frontend compatibility in this repo: `src/shared/api/schemas.ts` now accepts dynamic instruction `kind` strings, `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.vue` stream-refresh kind matching checks both top-level `kind` and `box.json.kind`, and schema/table regressions were extended in `src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts` + `src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/InstructionsTable.test.ts src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts`, `pnpm build`, and Torii tests: `cargo test -p iroha_torii instruction_dto_uses_wire_variant_for_unmapped_isi_kind -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii fallback_structured_payload_uses_wire_variant_for_unmapped_isi -- --nocapture`. |

Extended `src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts` to assert clipboard invocation on click. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/NodesTelemetry.test.ts src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts src/shared/ui/composables/usePeersTelemetry.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-135 | Add chain-analysis style transaction tracing workspace with WebGL graph rendering, lazy full-history expansion, risk heuristics, and CSV/JSON bundle import/export. | COMPLETED | Added `/tracing` workspace (`src/pages/TracingWorkspace.vue`) with lazy account/transaction-seeded expansion over explorer instructions (`kind=Transfer`, committed-only), local risk heuristics + manual labels, shortest-path search, and CSV/JSON bundle export/import. Added dedicated WebGL renderer (`src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.vue`) with zoom + pan + node selection for large graphs. Wired navigation and launch paths (`src/app/router.ts`, `src/shared/config.ts`, account tab launcher + transaction launcher). Extended API filters (`asset_id`, `account`) and tracing core helpers/tests (`src/shared/lib/tracing.ts`, `src/shared/lib/tracing.test.ts`, `src/shared/api/index.test.ts`, `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts`, `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts`, `src/pages/TransactionDetails.test.ts`, `src/pages/AccountDetails.test.ts`, `src/features/filter/transactions/model.test.ts`, `src/app/router.test.ts`, `src/shared/config.test.ts`). Hardening updates: one-pass account scan policy prevents cycle re-queue loops, graph snapshots are batched for large-trace performance, and `tracing.*` localization keys now have parity across all shipped locale JSON packs with parity assertions in `src/shared/lib/localization/index.test.ts`. Final verification: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm exec vitest run` (56 files / 317 tests passed), `pnpm build`. |
| EX-136 | Add a reset zoom/pan action on `/tracing` graph workspace. | COMPLETED | Added a graph-level reset button in `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.vue` (`data-test=\"trace-reset-viewport\"`) and wired it into `TraceGraphWebGL` through a new `viewportResetNonce` prop so the canvas re-fits viewport pan/zoom to current nodes. Added regression coverage in `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts` (reset trigger wiring) and `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts` (pan away + reset restores click hit). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-137 | Make `/tracing` account-seed mode auto-load direct inflows/outflows and support click-to-expand/collapse nodes. | COMPLETED | Refactored `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.vue` to stop recursive auto-enqueue and instead auto-scan only the seed account on bootstrap (showing direct inflows/outflows), while keeping discovered graph data cached. Added per-node expansion state (`expandedNodeIds`) and wired graph/list node clicks to toggle expand/collapse; expanding a node now enqueues that account for on-demand scan and collapsing hides that node’s expansion contribution from rendered nodes/edges/events without deleting cached data. Added list-item expansion state attributes for UX/tests and kept bundle export on full cached graph. Updated regression coverage in `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts` for one-hop seed loading and graph-click expand/collapse fetch behavior. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts` and `pnpm typecheck`. |
| EX-138 | Improve `/tracing` graph UX with cursor-anchored zoom, node-local overlay actions, and directional in/out flow links. | COMPLETED | `TraceGraphWebGL` now keeps wheel zoom anchored at cursor and emits node-context anchors + viewport-interaction events so `/tracing` can pin an overlay menu to the selected node. `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.vue` now renders a node-local menu (Expand/Collapse action) with directional flow lists (`Inflow`/`Outflow`) and highlights selected-node edge direction in the WebGL graph via curved, color-coded links for chain-analysis readability. Expanded regression coverage in `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts` (node-context payload + cursor-zoom hit stability + viewport interaction) and `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts` (menu-driven expand/collapse + in/out flow rendering). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-139 | Increase `/tracing` graph line/node visual weight and polish canvas presentation. | COMPLETED | `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.vue` now renders edges as thicker directional triangle ribbons (instead of thin `gl.LINES` strokes), increases node point sizing + halo shading for stronger visibility, and enables alpha blending for smoother layering. Canvas chrome was polished with richer gradients, subtle grid overlay, stronger border/glow treatment, and taller viewport height for clearer exploration. Updated WebGL test mocks in `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts` for blending/triangle constants. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-140 | Remove `/tracing` “Top entities” sidebar box and represent top entities directly by node size in the graph. | COMPLETED | Removed the `Top entities` panel from `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.vue` and replaced it with rank-driven node prominence sizing in the graph: `rankedNodes` now feeds `nodeProminenceById`, which is passed into `TraceGraphWebGL` per node. `src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.vue` now uses `prominence` to scale node size (and hit radius) so top entities stand out directly in-canvas. Updated regression coverage in `src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts` to stop relying on the removed list and assert the new UI behavior. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/pages/TracingWorkspace.test.ts src/shared/ui/components/TraceGraphWebGL.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-141 | Investigate production lag where home “Latest Transactions” appears slower to refresh than “Latest Blocks”. | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 production probe (`https://explorer.soramitsu.io` / `https://torii.soramitsu.io`): `/v2/explorer/blocks?per_page=5` responds in ~`0.09s`, while `/v2/explorer/transactions?per_page=5` takes ~`2.9s`–`4.1s` (observed occasional 5s timeout). Transaction SSE emits promptly, but widget refresh waits on the slower transactions list request. Upstream root cause: `handle_v1_explorer_transactions` materializes full history via `collect_transaction_summaries` before pagination (`../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`). |
| EX-142 | Reduce Torii `/v2/explorer/transactions` latency by paginating while scanning (avoid full-history materialization per request). | COMPLETED | Upstream patch landed in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`: `/v2/explorer/transactions` now counts all matched rows but only materializes DTOs for the requested page window (instead of collecting all DTOs before pagination). Added pagination helper coverage in `routing::tx_query_filter_tests` (`explorer_pagination_window_matches_paginate_semantics`, `explorer_pagination_meta_keeps_page_and_counts`). Verified with `cargo fmt --all -- crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs` and targeted tests (`cargo test -p iroha_torii routing::tx_query_filter_tests::explorer_pagination_window_matches_paginate_semantics -- --exact --nocapture`, `cargo test -p iroha_torii routing::tx_query_filter_tests::explorer_pagination_meta_keeps_page_and_counts -- --exact --nocapture`). Production explorer latency will improve once this Torii patch is deployed. |
| EX-143 | Reduce Torii `/v2/explorer/instructions` latency by paginating while scanning (avoid full-history materialization per request). | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 upstream patch in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`: `/v2/explorer/instructions` now page-materializes DTOs during scan while preserving full `total_items/total_pages` metadata. Added regression coverage (`routing::explorer_lookup_tests::explorer_instruction_history_collects_requested_page_only`). Verified with `cargo test -p iroha_torii explorer_lookup_tests --features app_api,telemetry`. |
| EX-144 | Speed up explorer transaction/instruction detail lookups by indexing transaction hash to block height (avoid linear chain scans per detail request). | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 upstream patch in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs`: detail handlers now use `state.committed_transaction_height` as fast path, then bounded fallback scan for index misses/mismatches. Added regression coverage (`routing::explorer_lookup_tests::explorer_detail_lookup_returns_transaction_and_instruction`). Verified with `cargo test -p iroha_torii explorer_lookup_tests --features app_api,telemetry`. |
| EX-145 | Harden production Explorer/Torii availability: investigate persistent `502 Bad Gateway` periods and add resilient fallback behavior. | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 frontend failover shipped: runtime-configurable Torii candidate list + thresholds (`src/shared/runtime-config.ts`), API failover manager with peer probing (`src/shared/api/index.ts`), Node Settings health/retry UX (`src/features/node-settings/NodeSettings.vue`), outage/degraded notices + retry in latest widgets, and runbook (`docs/roadmap/torii_outage_failover_runbook.md`). Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/runtime-config.test.ts src/shared/api/index.test.ts src/widgets/latest-blocks/LatestBlocks.test.ts src/widgets/latest-transactions/LatestTransactions.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-146 | Avoid possible duplicate initial fetches in polling mode (`setupAsyncData`) when `interval` + default immediate fetch are both enabled. | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 `setupAsyncData` polling startup now uses explicit interval behavior (`immediateCallback: false`) to prevent duplicate first fetch while preserving periodic polling. Added startup call-count tests in `src/shared/utils/setup-async-data.test.ts`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/utils/setup-async-data.test.ts`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build`. |
| EX-147 | Add explicit Explorer endpoint performance telemetry (p50/p95/p99 + error rates) and regression gates. | COMPLETED | 2026-03-04 upstream telemetry landed: new metrics `torii_explorer_requests_total` + `torii_explorer_request_duration_seconds` in `../iroha/crates/iroha_telemetry/src/metrics.rs`, wrapper wiring in `../iroha/crates/iroha_core/src/telemetry.rs`, and endpoint instrumentation in `../iroha/crates/iroha_torii/src/routing.rs` for explorer blocks/transactions/instructions (+ detail endpoints). | EX-148 | Restore `/transactions` rendering when Torii emits `executable = Ivm` in explorer payloads. | COMPLETED | Updated `src/shared/api/schemas.ts` to accept `Ivm` in `Transaction.executable`, preventing list/detail parse failures that previously rendered empty transaction tables. Updated `src/pages/TransactionDetails.vue` to treat `Ivm` as a smart-contract executable (same branch as `Wasm`) and added regression coverage in `src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts` + `src/pages/TransactionDetails.test.ts`. Verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/api/schemas.test.ts src/pages/TransactionDetails.test.ts` and `pnpm build`. |
